---
title: README
author: Kailin Xue
date: today
date-format: long
format: 
  pdf: default
  html: 
    self-contained: true
    df-print: tibble
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
execute: 
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
pacman::p_load(tidyverse, targets, gt)
here::here()
```

COMP 5070 statistical consulting project — analyses and reports prepared in response to requests from Karl Berator.
